description:
Duck Battle Royale is a chaotic battle royale where the fiercest competitors are ducks. Enter a world full of quirky quacks, encounters, and unpredictable chaos.
Every match is a test of timing, strategy, and sheer luck as you face off against feathered foes. Expect the unexpected, embrace the silliness, and dive into a wildly entertaining showdown. 
Will you outsmart your opponents and rise to the top?
The battlefield waits — and only one will claim victory.
